name: Uul-Netol's Vow
explicitMods: Socketed Support Gems can also Support Skills from Equipped Body Armour
flavourText: The time is nigh.
War has come.
We dream as one.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports attack skills, providing a bonus to all damage dealt by those skills while your life is full.
explicitMods: Supported Attack Skills deal 34% more Damage while on Full Life
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

name: Maloney's Mechanism
explicitMods: Trigger a Socketed Bow Skill when you Attack with a Bow, with a 1 second Cooldown
5% chance to Blind Enemies on Hit with Attacks
flavourText: Midnight tinkering begets midday murdering;
a sinister shaft surreptitiously shot slays a scoundrel.
I will see them again, but not until my work is done.

name: Victory Slippers
implicitMods: 41% increased Armour from Equipped Helmet and Gloves

socketedItems.secDescrText: Casts a buff that grants different bonuses to melee skills depending on your stance. Using the skill again alternates between Blood Stance and Sand Stance.

Melee Skills have 16% more Area of Effect while in Sand Stance
Melee Skills deal 5% less Area Damage while in Sand Stance
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports any skill gem. Once this gem reaches level 2 or above, will apply a cost & reservation multiplier to supported gems. Cannot support skills that don't come from gems.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Conjures an icy barrier that chills enemies when they hit you. You drop chilled ground while moving, and take less Fire and Physical damage while stationary.

Buff grants 21% less Fire Damage taken from Hits while stationary
Chill Enemy for 0.5 seconds when Hit, reducing their Action Speed by 30%

socketedItems.secDescrText: Grants a buff adding cold damage to spells and attacks. If you shatter an enemy, this skill will cause them to explode and deal AoE cold damage to enemies near them. This damage is not affected by modifiers to spell damage.

Buff grants 38 to 56 Added Spell Cold Damage

name: The Perfect Form
implicitMods: +2 to Level of Socketed Trap or Mine Gems
explicitMods: Evasion Rating is increased by Overcapped Cold Resistance
flavourText: We share one space,
speak one voice,
act through one body.
A flawless crystal.
Brittle.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Attacks an area in front of you. Each Reave that hits an enemy grants stages, which you will begin to lose after a short period without hitting anything. Only works with Daggers, Claws, and One-Handed Swords.

hybrid.secDescrText: Repeatedly attacks a large area in different directions. Each Vaal Reave that hits an enemy grants stages, which you will begin to lose after a short period without hitting anything. Only works with Daggers, Claws, and One-Handed Swords.

he seemed to grow larger and more frightening, drawing
increasingly fervorous responses from his rapt audience.

flavourText: "She fled from the prison of her birth, drawn by the breaking
of that great Silence. At that moment, the universe was changed,
and walls that were once impenetrable became brittle.
A fortress became a shell, and she alone escaped."

name: Replica Dreamfeather
flavourText: "Once we armoured the test subject heavily enough to test Prototype #502, he proceeded
to fight his way out. I don't know what we expected."
- Researcher Graven
